heading: VictorOps
body:
To create or update a VictorOps integration using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas integrations create VICTOR_OPS [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas integrations create VICTOR\_OPS](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-integrations-create-VICTOR_OPS).
